creator: language.devel@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Mikael Urankar from comment #5)

databases/cassandra3 isn't compatible with Java 11, so let's not worry about that. 

Too bad we can't very easily specify a minimum max memory (letting Java set a higher max from the default but not allowing it to set a limit below a certain value). But wishful thinking aside, this gets a green light from me.
